gt_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.potential DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.player_name
FROM Player p
JOIN Player_Attributes pa ON p.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
WHERE pa.potential = (SELECT MAX(potential) FROM Player_Attributes)
question: What is the name of players with the highest potential?
